segments.text: As data scientists, you know that building robust AI agents means more than just clever modelsâ€”itâ€™s about creating reliable environments. Today, Iâ€™ll show you how harness engineering with hooks empowers effective customization and maintainability.

In the context of AI agent development, robust harness engineering with hooks allows you to build personal AI systems that are both flexible and auditable. Letâ€™s look at a high-level pipeline configuration where hooks reinforce controlled extensibility and traceability.
